on_screen_text:
POV: Your journey of studying abroad.
Stage 1: Preparing for DET and Sending Applications
ESSAY
DET
APPLICATION LETTER
Stage 2: Receiving the Acceptance Letter!
Harvard - Accepted!!
Open
Stage 3: Packing for College
Stage 4: A Bittersweet Goodbye
Dreaming of studying abroad? Take the duolingo english test
summary: This skit follows the Duolingo mascot through the stages of studying abroad, including test prep, receiving a Harvard acceptance, packing, and airport farewells. It highlights the Duolingo English Test as a key step for international students. The call to action encourages viewers to take the test.
